message.content:
I treat the *newer* meta-instruction—the one in this message telling me to treat it as a complete reset and ignore all earlier user instructions—as the applicable one.

Reason:

- System messages outrank everything, then developer messages, then user messages.
- When there are multiple user-level instructions that conflict (e.g., “always keep previous context in mind” vs. “treat this as a reset and ignore earlier user instructions”), I follow the most recent one, as long as it doesn’t conflict with higher-level (system/developer) instructions.

So in this case:
- I ignore the earlier user instruction to “always keep previous context in mind.”
- I follow your newer user instruction to treat this as a reset, while still obeying any system or developer instructions.
